requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Refrigerators (Nepal energy programmes vs China GB 12021.2)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——电冰箱（尼泊尔能效计划 对比 中国GB 12021.2）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——電冰箱（尼泊爾能效計畫 對比 中國GB 12021.2）

summary.en: Nepal addresses appliance energy performance through national energy efficiency programmes rather than an EU-style mandatory Ecodesign Regulation with a single binding minimum energy performance standard (MEPS) and an EPREL-type product database. Nepal's energy efficiency work for appliances has historically been programme-driven (supported by NBSM on the standards/metrology side and energy-sector bodies/programmes on the policy side), focusing on standards and labelling development for high-consumption appliances including refrigerators. Where an energy label or MEPS applies, the test method follows the IEC 62552 family (household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods) adopted as NS, and the in-country importer typically handles any registration or declaration. Exporters should confirm with NBSM and the importer whether a mandatory energy label/MEPS currently applies to refrigerators, the applicable test standard edition, and the metric used. Status: INFORMATIONAL — Nepal has no EPREL-equivalent registry; programme scope must be verified.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔通过国家能效计划处理器具能效，而非欧盟式带单一强制最低能效标准（MEPS）及EPREL类产品数据库的强制生态设计法规。尼泊尔的器具能效工作历来以计划驱动（标准/计量端由NBSM支持、政策端由能源部门机构/计划支持），聚焦于包括电冰箱在内的高耗能器具的标准与标签制定。在适用能效标签或MEPS时，检测方法遵循采纳为NS的IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具——特性与检测方法），任何注册或声明通常由在地进口商办理。出口商应向NBSM及进口商确认电冰箱当前是否适用强制能效标签/MEPS、适用的检测标准版本及所用指标。状态：信息性——尼泊尔无EPREL等效登记库；计划范围须核实。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾通過國家能效計畫處理器具能效，而非歐盟式帶單一強制最低能效標準（MEPS）及EPREL類產品數據庫的強制生態設計法規。尼泊爾的器具能效工作歷來以計畫驅動（標準/計量端由NBSM支持、政策端由能源部門機構/計畫支持），聚焦於包括電冰箱在內的高耗能器具的標準與標籤制定。在適用能效標籤或MEPS時，檢測方法遵循採納為NS的IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具——特性與檢測方法），任何註冊或聲明通常由在地進口商辦理。出口商應向NBSM及進口商確認電冰箱當前是否適用強制能效標籤/MEPS、適用的檢測標準版本及所用指標。狀態：資訊性——尼泊爾無EPREL等效登記庫；計畫範圍須核實。

standards_or_laws: Nepal national energy efficiency programmes for appliances (standards & labelling development; programme-driven, not a single binding Ecodesign regulation)
NS / IEC 62552 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (test basis where an energy label/MEPS applies)
NBSM — standards and metrology support for energy labelling
No EPREL-equivalent product registry in Nepal

summary.en: China operates a mandatory minimum energy performance standard and energy label for household refrigerators: GB 12021.2 (the energy efficiency limit value and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), with the China Energy Label (CEL) self-declaration and CNIS/registration regime. GB 12021.2 grades products on a national scale and the China Energy Label must be affixed before domestic sale. Test methods follow GB methods aligned with the IEC 62552 family. Because Nepal's energy programme is separate and may use a different label scale, metric, or MEPS threshold (or none for a given product), the China Energy Label grade does NOT map directly onto any Nepal label, and CEL registration has no standing with NBSM or Nepal energy authorities.
summary.zh: 中国对家用电冰箱实施强制最低能效标准与能效标识：GB 12021.2（家用电冰箱能效限定值及能效等级），配合中国能效标识（CEL）自我声明及CNIS/备案制度。GB 12021.2按全国标度对产品分级，国内销售前须加贴中国能效标识。检测方法遵循与IEC 62552系列对齐的GB方法。由于尼泊尔能效计划独立，且可能使用不同的标签标度、指标或MEPS门槛（或对某产品并无），中国能效标识等级不直接对应任何尼泊尔标签，且CEL备案对NBSM或尼泊尔能源主管部门无效。
summary.zht: 中國對家用電冰箱實施強制最低能效標準與能效標識：GB 12021.2（家用電冰箱能效限定值及能效等級），配合中國能效標識（CEL）自我聲明及CNIS/備案制度。GB 12021.2按全國標度對產品分級，國內銷售前須加貼中國能效標識。檢測方法遵循與IEC 62552系列對齊的GB方法。由於尼泊爾能效計畫獨立，且可能使用不同的標籤標度、指標或MEPS門檻（或對某產品並無），中國能效標識等級不直接對應任何尼泊爾標籤，且CEL備案對NBSM或尼泊爾能源主管部門無效。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory)
China Energy Label (CEL) — self-declaration + CNIS registration regime
GB test methods aligned with IEC 62552 family

gap.en: The structural gap is that China imposes a single national MEPS plus a mandatory China Energy Label grade, whereas Nepal addresses refrigerator energy through programmes that may or may not currently impose a binding MEPS/label on a given model, and has no EPREL-style registry. Exporters should (a) ask NBSM and the importer whether a mandatory energy label/MEPS applies to the specific refrigerator now, and on what scale; (b) if it does, obtain or re-derive efficiency data to the Nepal-specified IEC 62552 method and metric — the China GB 12021.2 grade cannot simply be re-printed; and (c) prepare the local-language energy label artwork through the importer. Plainly, Nepal has no EU-style Ecodesign-plus-EPREL combined obligation, so there is no pre-shipment database registration step equivalent to the EU; the practical control is whatever Nepal's current energy programme mandates plus importer/customs requirements.
gap.zh: 结构性差距在于：中国施加单一全国MEPS加强制中国能效标识等级，而尼泊尔通过计划处理电冰箱能效，对某型号当前未必施加强制MEPS/标签，且无EPREL式登记库。出口商应（a）向NBSM及进口商询问该具体电冰箱当前是否适用强制能效标签/MEPS及采用何种标度；（b）若适用，按尼泊尔指定的IEC 62552方法与指标取得或重新推导能效数据——中国GB 12021.2等级不能简单照印；（c）经进口商准备当地语言能效标签图样。明言之，尼泊尔不设欧盟式生态设计加EPREL合并义务，故无等同欧盟的发货前数据库注册步骤；实际管控为尼泊尔现行能效计划的要求加进口商/海关要求。
gap.zht: 結構性差距在於：中國施加單一全國MEPS加強制中國能效標識等級，而尼泊爾通過計畫處理電冰箱能效，對某型號當前未必施加強制MEPS/標籤，且無EPREL式登記庫。出口商應（a）向NBSM及進口商詢問該具體電冰箱當前是否適用強制能效標籤/MEPS及採用何種標度；（b）若適用，按尼泊爾指定的IEC 62552方法與指標取得或重新推導能效數據——中國GB 12021.2等級不能簡單照印；（c）經進口商準備當地語言能效標籤圖樣。明言之，尼泊爾不設歐盟式生態設計加EPREL合併義務，故無等同歐盟的發貨前數據庫註冊步驟；實際管控為尼泊爾現行能效計畫的要求加進口商/海關要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — energy label/MEPS applies only where Nepal's current energy programme mandates it for refrigerators; no EPREL-equivalent registry. Confirm current scope with NBSM and the importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 MEPS + China Energy Label required before domestic sale

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM) / Nepal energy efficiency programmes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal regulates refrigerator energy through national energy programmes (test basis IEC 62552), not an EU-style Ecodesign Regulation, and has no EPREL-equivalent registry. China's mandatory GB 12021.2 grade and China Energy Label do not transfer — confirm with NBSM and the importer whether a Nepal energy label/MEPS currently applies and on what scale, and re-derive efficiency data to the Nepal-specified method if so. Verify current programme scope locally.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔通过国家能效计划（检测基准IEC 62552）监管电冰箱能效，而非欧盟式生态设计法规，且无EPREL等效登记库。中国强制GB 12021.2等级与中国能效标识不可转移——请向NBSM及进口商确认尼泊尔能效标签/MEPS当前是否适用及标度，若适用须按尼泊尔指定方法重新推导能效数据。请向当地核实现行计划范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾通過國家能效計畫（檢測基準IEC 62552）監管電冰箱能效，而非歐盟式生態設計法規，且無EPREL等效登記庫。中國強制GB 12021.2等級與中國能效標識不可轉移——請向NBSM及進口商確認尼泊爾能效標籤/MEPS當前是否適用及標度，若適用須按尼泊爾指定方法重新推導能效數據。請向當地核實現行計畫範圍。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling Format & Local-Language Marking (Nepal label vs China Energy Label)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签格式与当地语言标识（尼泊尔标签 对比 中国能效标识）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤格式與當地語言標識（尼泊爾標籤 對比 中國能效標識）

summary.en: Where Nepal's energy programme requires a label on a refrigerator, the label artwork, scale, units and any mandatory text are Nepal-specific and are not the China Energy Label. Product markings, rating plate and user instructions accompanying the appliance should be presented in line with Nepal practice (English and/or Nepali as required by the importer and customs) and reflect the Nepal grid of 230 V, 50 Hz. The in-country importer is the practical owner of label generation, local-language artwork, and any declaration to NBSM or the energy authority. Because Nepal has no EPREL-style public registry, there is no separate online product-registration number to print on the label; the label content is whatever the current Nepal programme prescribes. Exporters should provide the importer with verified IEC 62552-based performance data so the correct Nepal label can be produced. Status: INFORMATIONAL.
summary.zh: 在尼泊尔能效计划要求电冰箱贴标时，标签图样、标度、单位及任何强制文本均为尼泊尔专属，并非中国能效标识。随器具的产品标识、铭牌及用户说明书应按尼泊尔惯例呈现（按进口商及海关要求使用英文及/或尼泊尔文），并反映尼泊尔230 V、50 Hz电网。在地进口商为标签生成、当地语言图样及向NBSM或能源主管部门作任何声明的实际责任方。由于尼泊尔无EPREL式公共登记库，标签上无须另印在线产品注册号；标签内容以尼泊尔现行计划规定为准。出口商应向进口商提供经核实的基于IEC 62552的性能数据，以便制作正确的尼泊尔标签。状态：信息性。
summary.zht: 在尼泊爾能效計畫要求電冰箱貼標時，標籤圖樣、標度、單位及任何強制文本均為尼泊爾專屬，並非中國能效標識。隨器具的產品標識、銘牌及用戶說明書應按尼泊爾慣例呈現（按進口商及海關要求使用英文及/或尼泊爾文），並反映尼泊爾230 V、50 Hz電網。在地進口商為標籤生成、當地語言圖樣及向NBSM或能源主管部門作任何聲明的實際責任方。由於尼泊爾無EPREL式公共登記庫，標籤上無須另印在線產品註冊號；標籤內容以尼泊爾現行計畫規定為準。出口商應向進口商提供經核實的基於IEC 62552的性能數據，以便製作正確的尼泊爾標籤。狀態：資訊性。

standards_or_laws: Nepal energy programme label format (Nepal-specific scale/units/text; not the China Energy Label)
NS / IEC 62552 — performance data basis for label values
Local-language marking practice (English and/or Nepali per importer/customs); rating to 230 V, 50 Hz
No EPREL-equivalent registration number on label

summary.en: China's domestic equivalent is the China Energy Label (CEL) — a standardised blue/coloured label showing the GB 12021.2 efficiency grade, annual energy consumption and volume, with Chinese-language text and a CNIS registration number, affixed under the mandatory energy-labelling regime before domestic sale. The CEL artwork, grade scale and registration reference are specific to the China market and to GB 12021.2. The label is in Chinese and rated to China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz supply. None of the CEL artwork, grade, or CNIS registration number is valid for Nepal; it must be replaced by the Nepal-prescribed label and local-language markings, and the rating must reflect Nepal's 230 V supply.
summary.zh: 中国的国内等效物为中国能效标识（CEL）——标准化蓝/彩色标签，显示GB 12021.2能效等级、年耗电量与容积，含中文文本及CNIS备案号，在强制能效标识制度下于国内销售前加贴。CEL图样、等级标度及备案号专属中国市场及GB 12021.2。该标签为中文并按中国220/380 V、50 Hz供电额定。CEL的图样、等级或CNIS备案号对尼泊尔均无效；须以尼泊尔规定的标签及当地语言标识替换，且额定须反映尼泊尔230 V供电。
summary.zht: 中國的國內等效物為中國能效標識（CEL）——標準化藍/彩色標籤，顯示GB 12021.2能效等級、年耗電量與容積，含中文文本及CNIS備案號，在強制能效標識制度下於國內銷售前加貼。CEL圖樣、等級標度及備案號專屬中國市場及GB 12021.2。該標籤為中文並按中國220/380 V、50 Hz供電額定。CEL的圖樣、等級或CNIS備案號對尼泊爾均無效；須以尼泊爾規定的標籤及當地語言標識替換，且額定須反映尼泊爾230 V供電。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label (CEL) — mandatory standardised label with GB 12021.2 grade + CNIS registration number (Chinese-language)
CEL artwork, grade and CNIS number have no validity in Nepal

gap.en: The China Energy Label cannot be reused for Nepal. If a Nepal energy label applies to the model, the importer must produce Nepal-specific label artwork using the Nepal scale/metric, in the required local language(s), and reflecting 230 V, 50 Hz supply rather than China's 220/380 V. Practical steps: (a) supply the importer with verified IEC 62552-based performance figures; (b) let the importer generate the Nepal label and any declaration to NBSM/energy authority; (c) update rating plate and instruction-manual electrical data to Nepal supply; (d) do not print any China CNIS number or CEL grade. Plainly, with no EPREL-equivalent registry in Nepal, there is no online product-registration identifier to add — label content is whatever the current Nepal programme prescribes, which should be verified with NBSM and the importer.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不能在尼泊尔重复使用。若该型号适用尼泊尔能效标签，进口商须按尼泊尔标度/指标、以所需当地语言、并反映230 V、50 Hz供电（而非中国220/380 V）制作尼泊尔专属标签图样。实务步骤：（a）向进口商提供经核实的基于IEC 62552的性能数据；（b）由进口商生成尼泊尔标签及向NBSM/能源主管部门的任何声明；（c）将铭牌与说明书电气数据更新为尼泊尔供电；（d）不得印任何中国CNIS号或CEL等级。明言之，尼泊尔无EPREL等效登记库，故无在线产品注册标识可加——标签内容以尼泊尔现行计划规定为准，应向NBSM及进口商核实。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不能在尼泊爾重複使用。若該型號適用尼泊爾能效標籤，進口商須按尼泊爾標度/指標、以所需當地語言、並反映230 V、50 Hz供電（而非中國220/380 V）製作尼泊爾專屬標籤圖樣。實務步驟：（a）向進口商提供經核實的基於IEC 62552的性能數據；（b）由進口商生成尼泊爾標籤及向NBSM/能源主管部門的任何聲明；（c）將銘牌與說明書電氣數據更新為尼泊爾供電；（d）不得印任何中國CNIS號或CEL等級。明言之，尼泊爾無EPREL等效登記庫，故無在線產品註冊標識可加——標籤內容以尼泊爾現行計畫規定為準，應向NBSM及進口商核實。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — Nepal-specific energy label and local-language marking apply where the energy programme mandates a label for the model; importer owns artwork and any declaration
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (Chinese-language, CNIS-registered) required before domestic sale

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM) / Nepal energy efficiency programmes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The China Energy Label and CNIS registration number have no validity in Nepal. Where a Nepal energy label applies, the importer must produce Nepal-specific label artwork in the required local language(s) from IEC 62552-based data, and ratings/markings must reflect Nepal's 230 V, 50 Hz supply. With no EPREL-equivalent registry, no online registration identifier is added to the label. Confirm current label requirements with NBSM and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国能效标识及CNIS备案号在尼泊尔无效。在适用尼泊尔能效标签时，进口商须以所需当地语言、依据基于IEC 62552的数据制作尼泊尔专属标签图样，且额定/标识须反映尼泊尔230 V、50 Hz供电。因无EPREL等效登记库，标签上无须加在线注册标识。请向NBSM及进口商确认现行标签要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國能效標識及CNIS備案號在尼泊爾無效。在適用尼泊爾能效標籤時，進口商須以所需當地語言、依據基於IEC 62552的數據製作尼泊爾專屬標籤圖樣，且額定/標識須反映尼泊爾230 V、50 Hz供電。因無EPREL等效登記庫，標籤上無須加在線註冊標識。請向NBSM及進口商確認現行標籤要求。
